# doit_cloud_diagram_stats (Data Source)

Cloud Diagrams visualize your cloud infrastructure and resource relationships.

## Example Usage

```terraform
# Get diagram stats for the last 30 days.
data "doit_cloud_diagram_stats" "example" {
  start = timeadd(plantimestamp(), "-720h")
  end   = plantimestamp()
}

# Output diagrams with changes.
output "diagrams_with_changes" {
  value = [
    for stat in data.doit_cloud_diagram_stats.example.cloud_diagram_stats :
    stat if length(stat.changes) > 0
  ]
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `end` (String) End of the period.
- `start` (String) Start of the period.

### Optional

- `timeouts` (Attributes) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--timeouts))

### Read-Only

- `cloud_diagram_stats` (Attributes Set) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--cloud_diagram_stats))
- `id` (String) A deterministic hash of the query parameters, used as the data source identifier.

<a id="nestedatt--timeouts"></a>
### Nested Schema for `timeouts`

Optional:

- `read` (String) A string that can be [parsed as a duration](https://pkg.go.dev/time#ParseDuration) consisting of numbers and unit suffixes, such as "30s" or "2h45m". Valid time units are "s" (seconds), "m" (minutes), "h" (hours).


<a id="nestedatt--cloud_diagram_stats"></a>
### Nested Schema for `cloud_diagram_stats`

Read-Only:

- `_id` (String) ID of the diagram.
- `account_id` (String) Cloud account ID.
- `account_name` (String) Cloud account name.
- `account_type` (String) Cloud account type.
- `changes` (Attributes List) Activity changes within the period. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--cloud_diagram_stats--changes))
- `import` (Attributes) Current import/sync state for a cloud-connected diagram. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--cloud_diagram_stats--import))
- `name` (String) Name of the diagram.
- `ss_id` (String) ID of the layer the diagram belongs to.
- `type` (String) Type of the diagram.

<a id="nestedatt--cloud_diagram_stats--changes"></a>
### Nested Schema for `cloud_diagram_stats.changes`

Read-Only:

- `count` (Number) Number of occurrences of this change type.
- `service` (String) Cloud service the change applies to.
- `type` (String) Type of the change.


<a id="nestedatt--cloud_diagram_stats--import"></a>
### Nested Schema for `cloud_diagram_stats.import`

Read-Only:

- `account` (String) Connected account ID.
- `cloud_id` (String) Cloud account ID.
- `error_message` (String) Error message if the import failed.
- `status` (String) Import status.
- `synced_at` (String) Timestamp of the last successful sync.
- `type` (String) Connected cloud account type.
